Title: Set up repo
Labels: Set up the FrontDesk Pro engineering foundation
column13: Repo can be cloned and run locally; CI runs on pull requests; Staging deploy succeeds automatically; Production deploy path is defined but protected; Secrets are not hardcoded

Title: Build auth foundation and organization/workspace model
Description: Implement authentication and the base multi-tenant organization/workspace model for FrontDesk Pro.
Acceptance Criteria: New user can sign up and create an organization; Authenticated users land inside the correct workspace; Unauthenticated users cannot access app routes; Organization context is available throughout the app

Title: Create base design system and authenticated app shell
Description: Create the base UI system for FrontDesk Pro
column14: Authenticated app has a reusable layout; Components are consistent across pages; Mobile navigation works cleanly; Empty state pattern exists for future modules

Title: Create core schema for customers
column10: Design and implement the initial database schema for the core operational entities in FrontDesk Pro.
column11: Migrations run cleanly; Core entities are organization-scoped; Relationships support future module builds; Schema is documented enough for frontend integration

Title: Build organization setup flow and seeded demo data tools
Description: Create the first-run organization setup experience and a seeded demo-data path for testing and product demos.
Acceptance Criteria: New organization can complete setup; Seeded org loads with realistic sample data; Empty org and seeded org both work correctly

Title: Build dashboard shell with live data widgets
Description: Create the first usable dashboard with live operational widgets for the current organization.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard loads organization-specific data; Empty states are handled cleanly; Seeded data displays correctly; Dashboard is usable on desktop and mobile

Title: Build customer list view with search
Dependencies: Ship the main customer list screen with search
column9: User can search customers by name
column11: or email; List works on desktop and mobile; Empty state is clear and useful; Only organization-scoped customers are shown

Title: Build add/edit customer forms and customer detail view
Description: Create full customer CRUD and a customer detail page.
Labels: and view customers; Validation works correctly; Customer details persist and reload properly; Mobile form experience is usable

Title: Link customers to jobs
Dependencies: Expand customer detail so it acts as the central relationship hub for service history.
Labels: Customer detail shows related jobs and invoices; Customer history updates as new records are created; Relationships are scoped and accurate

Title: Build jobs list view with status filters and mobile-friendly layout
Description: Create the main jobs list screen with useful status filters and responsive UI.
Acceptance Criteria: Jobs can be filtered by status; Jobs list is readable on mobile; Status counts are accurate; Only current org jobs are shown

Title: Build create/edit job form and customer-linked job workflow
Description: Create the job creation and edit flow
Dependencies: User can create a job from a customer; Job saves correctly; Job can be edited later; Job remains linked to the selected customer

Title: Build job detail page and status lifecycle
Description: Create the job detail page and the core job status workflow.
Acceptance Criteria: User can move job through valid status changes; Status updates reflect in dashboard and list views; Completed jobs remain linked to customer history; Mobile detail view is usable in the field
